insights.headline: OpenClaw hits 250K GitHub stars — #1 repo ever
insights.detail: Surpassed React and Linux in 60 days. 2M+ monthly active users, 1.5M agents built, 13K+ skills on ClawHub.

insights.headline: OpenAI hires OpenClaw creator, funds independent foundation
insights.detail: Peter Steinberger (Austrian, ex-PSPDFKit €100M exit) joins OpenAI. OpenClaw stays MIT-licensed under new foundation.

insights.headline: ⚠️ "ClawHavoc" malware campaign hits ClawHub skills
insights.detail: Credential stealers and backdoors in community skills. Skills run with agent-level system access.

insights.headline: NVIDIA NemoClaw — enterprise agent stack at GTC 2026
insights.detail: Single-command deploy of OpenClaw + OpenShell sandbox + Nemotron models + Red Hat AI. Deny-by-default, K8s-native.

insights.headline: ACP bridge connects coding IDEs to agents
insights.detail: OpenClaw's acpx connects Zed and JetBrains. Current gap: no full file access or per-session MCP servers.

insights.headline: Model-agnostic: Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, local Ollama
insights.detail: Switch models via config, not code. Bedrock, Qwen, Mistral all supported. Run fully local for zero API cost.

insights.headline: Hostinger leads OpenClaw hosting at $9/mo — 1-click deploy
insights.detail: Cheapest quality: Hetzner $4/mo. Managed: OpenClaw Cloud $59/mo. Enterprise stacks $499-999/mo.

insights.headline: Consulting market booming: $50-$5,000 per setup
insights.detail: Enterprise implementations: $2.5K-5K setup + recurring management fees. Booming freelancer market.

insights.headline: Linux playbook: free core, commercial ecosystem
insights.detail: OpenClaw generates zero direct revenue. Value captured by hosting, NVIDIA, model APIs, and consultants.

insights.headline: China's "Lobster Fever": ¥1B+ in OpenClaw subsidies
insights.detail: Shanghai ¥1B AI fund. Shenzhen ¥2M/project. "One-person company" initiative — target 1,000+ startups by 2027.

insights.headline: Baidu DuClaw — browser-based OpenClaw for 700M users
insights.detail: Zero-deployment, built-in Baidu Search/Scholar. Tencent and Alibaba building variants.

insights.headline: EU AI Act: autonomous agents "high-risk" by Aug 2027
insights.detail: Risk assessment, transparency, human oversight required. New field: "Agentic Law."

insights.headline: AWS European Sovereign Cloud goes GA — Frankfurt ops
insights.detail: Physically separate from commercial AWS. EU-resident staff only. Targets DORA, NIS2.

insights.headline: Microsoft completes EU Data Boundary for all core services
insights.detail: Azure, M365, Dynamics data stays in EU. Includes support data and diagnostic logs.

insights.headline: EU Data Act: zero cloud switching charges by Jan 2027
insights.detail: Interoperability standards mandatory. Creates market opening for local EU providers.

insights.headline: NVIDIA OpenShell: deny-by-default sandbox for agents
insights.detail: Docker-based isolation. No network by default. Fine-grained policy engine, K8s-native.

insights.headline: Cisco AI Defense integrates with NemoClaw stack
insights.detail: Enterprise agent security: threat detection, access control, audit trails.

insights.headline: Most OpenClaw deployments run with zero security hardening
insights.detail: Default configs expose full system. No sandboxing, no tool restrictions, no audit logging.
